picks.analysis: ORCL scores +15 — a Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Fundamentals (+7), reinforced by Narrative (+7). The biggest contributors are Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Guidance (+2, +23.6%), Streak (+2, 6d green). Cutting the other way: RSI 14 (-1, 72.0), Support/Resistance (-1, ±0.8% to R). Within Technology we gave ORCL a +15 and NET a +14 — same direction, lower conviction — which is why we'd take ORCL calls over NET calls, mainly on Fundamentals (+7 vs +4). The suggested calls sit ~15.4% OTM with 48d to expiry, delta 0.31, mid $8.32 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.

reasons.technical: round number $155.00 at $155.00 (-3.3%) — the first crack below spot. Losing it on volume warns the cut is next; reduce rather than hope.

reasons.technical: A daily close below $147.53 (-8.0%) breaks the structure driving the call — the chart says the move is over. Don't hold a long call under broken support.
reasons.fundamental: A guidance cut or a macro risk-off rotation is what usually drives price here — exit, don't average down.
reasons.mechanical: A surge in put buying / put-call pushing back above ~1.25 confirms the turn.
reasons.narrative: If "Utilities - Independent Power Producers Watchlist" flips against the trade, the reason for the position is gone — exit on the narrative, not the chart.

levels.prose: A close below round number $150.00 breaks the structure the trade is built on.

triggers: Exit before earnings (2026-08-06): the post-report IV crush can erase a long premium even when the direction is right.
Time stop: don't carry into the final week before Sep 17 '26 — theta accelerates and the breakeven move gets harder each day.
Thesis check: if a higher-scoring setup appears or the original reason for the trade stops being true, rotate out regardless of price.
exitPlan.overviewAi: This trade targets a breakout to $219.82, trimming at key resistance levels and cutting losses below $147.53.

picks.analysis: VST scores +13 — a Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Narrative (+7), reinforced by Fundamentals (+3). The biggest contributors are Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Guidance (+2, +80.3%), Sector Narrative (+2, tailwind). Cutting the other way: Earnings Surprise (-1, -7.7%). Within Utilities, the next-closest same-direction peer is OKLO at +3 — well below VST's +13 (VST leads on Narrative (+7 vs +0) and Technicals (+2 vs -1)), so VST is the cleaner calls expression. The suggested calls sit ~15.4% OTM with 111d to expiry, delta 0.39, mid $10.55 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.
